name: Roz Lawsuit Loans
description_short: Roz Lawsuit Loans offers pre-settlement legal funding to plaintiffs in California, providing cash advances against pending lawsuit settlements.
description_long:
Roz Lawsuit Loans is a small California-licensed lawsuit funding operation run by Roz Andrews, based at 1450 University Avenue #201 in San Diego, CA 92103. The company was established to provide financial assistance to plaintiffs awaiting resolution of their legal cases. The website, hosted on Blogspot, has been active since at least January 2021 and lists 24/7 availability by phone.

The company's core offering is pre-settlement lawsuit funding — a cash advance provided to plaintiffs while their case is pending. This type of product is non-recourse in many markets, meaning repayment is typically contingent on winning or settling the case. Roz Lawsuit Loans states it is licensed to operate in California and can be reached by phone at (619) 728-6204 or via email at support@rozlawsuitloans.com around the clock.

What sets this company apart — at least on paper — is its claimed 24/7 availability and its status as a licensed California operator. The business lists multilingual capability (English and Chinese-language service implied), which may serve San Diego's diverse plaintiff population. The single point of contact is the owner, Roz Andrews, suggesting a highly personalized service model rather than a large institutional lender.

Honestly, the public-facing information available for Roz Lawsuit Loans is extremely limited. The company's web presence consists of a personal resume-style Blogspot template with no published rates, no disclosed fees, no loan ranges, no application process, no client testimonials, and no third-party accreditations. The site has had no new content since January 2021 and shows signs of dormancy. Consumers comparing lawsuit funding options would have almost no basis for evaluating this company against established pre-settlement funders without making direct phone contact. Due diligence is strongly advised before engaging.

When evaluating debt relief companies, consumers should compare settlement programs against alternatives like debt consolidation loans, which combine multiple debts into a single fixed-rate payment. Credit counseling through nonprofit agencies offers free budgeting help without impacting credit scores. For those whose credit has already been damaged, credit repair services can address inaccurate negative items on reports. Personal loans for bad credit may provide funds for debt payoff at lower rates than credit cards, and credit monitoring services help track progress throughout the recovery process. Consolidating high-interest balances into a single installment loan with a fixed rate can reduce total interest paid and simplify monthly budgeting.
address: 1450 University Ave Ste 201, San Diego, CA 92103

company_info.headquarters: 1450 University Ave Ste 201, San Diego, CA 92103

pros: Claims to hold a California state license to operate as a lawsuit funding provider
24/7 phone availability at (619) 728-6204 for immediate inquiries
Direct owner contact (Roz Andrews) suggests personalized service rather than a large call center
San Diego physical address (1450 University Avenue #201) provides a verifiable local presence
Offers email support at support@rozlawsuitloans.com as an alternative contact channel
Multilingual capability implied (English and Chinese speakers noted on site)
cons: Website is a bare Blogspot personal resume template with no rates, terms, loan amounts, or application process disclosed
No content published since January 2021 — site appears dormant and may indicate the business is inactive
Zero third-party reviews, BBB rating, or accreditation information available
No information on funding amounts, fees, or repayment conditions — critical details for lawsuit loan comparison
Website infrastructure (free Blogspot blog) raises credibility concerns for a financial services provider
best_for: California plaintiffs in active personal injury or civil cases who need cash while awaiting settlement
Consumers who prefer direct, one-on-one contact with a small independent funder rather than a large company
Spanish- or Chinese-speaking plaintiffs in the San Diego area seeking local funding assistance
diagnosis: Roz Lawsuit Loans is a small, single-operator pre-settlement funding company serving California plaintiffs, best suited for individuals who want direct personal contact rather than a large institutional lender. The near-total absence of disclosed rates, terms, or recent activity means consumers cannot evaluate this provider without a direct phone call, and should compare offers from multiple funders before proceeding.
services: Pre-settlement lawsuit funding (cash advance against pending case)
Local San Diego in-person or phone service
